FROM
 $$NRTACCUMVWDB.CG1_XXCCP_OE_ORDER_HEADER CG1_XXCCP_OE_ORDER_HEADER
 WHERE
CG1_XXCCP_OE_ORDER_HEADER.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= '$$LastExtractDate' AND CG1_XXCCP_OE_ORDER_HEADER.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME < '$$EndLastExtractDate' 
AND
CG1_XXCCP_OE_ORDER_HEADER.SOURCE_DML_TYPE <> 'DELETE'
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY CG1_XXCCP_OE_ORDER_HEADER.XXCCP_HEADER_ID ORDER BY CG1_XXCCP_OE_ORDER_HEADER.REFRESH_DATETIME DESC) = 1
